ImportImage.name: Image name. Supports uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Must start with a letter. Length: 1–65 characters.
ImportImage.detection: Image detection. If not set, detection is not triggered. If true, image detection runs automatically after import. If false, detection is skipped after import. Default: false.
ImportImage.generationType: Specifies whether the imported image is for BCC or EBC. Enum values: BCC, EBC. Default: BCC.
